title: Blinkit Again
message1: Taaki aap aur boht kuch khaate peete raho (hopefully healthy😋 and sometimes junk😝) 😘 (fir vahi same blinkit card daldia 🤧 next time kuch creative sochunga)
message2: Add gift card in Blinkit money in the app to use

title: Tira Beauty
message1: For my most beautiful woman, I'll use these products too from your face and lips 👄 by kissing you all over 🤤
message2: Aapke fav products like Gush, Deconstruct etc. you can buy here. Click on gift card button on Tira website/app's payment page, then enter the code and PIN below to use

title: Blinkit
message1: Kuch acha khaya peeya kro jaanu 😭
message2: Add gift card in Blinkit money in the app to use
